blurb_en: The first fully AI-generated live-action feature accepted by a major film festival premieres at Tribeca on June 10 — a 75-minute docudrama about the 2026 Tehran protests, produced with no cameras, no actors, and a budget of $2,000. Brothers Ash and Pooya Koosha built the film from AI video tools, journalistic reports, and eyewitness accounts, depicting five Iranians in a Tehran alley in the hours before their execution, witnessed through the window of a ten-year-old boy with cerebral palsy. Festival director Jane Rosenthal defended the programming by saying it ‘should be seen right now, at this time,’ which is the kind of answer that makes both sides of the AI debate uncomfortable. The $2,000 figure will be the one everyone quotes.
blurb_zh: 《紫罗兰之梦》将于6月10日在翠贝卡电影节世界首映——这是首部被主流电影节接纳的全AI生成真人故事片，全片无演员、无摄影机，制作成本仅2000美元。影片由阿什和普亚·库沙兄弟执导，根据新闻报道和目击证词，用AI视频工具还原了2026年德黑兰抗议中五名伊朗人被处决前的最后时刻。电影节主席珍·罗森塔尔表示，这部影片“就应该在此刻被看见”。2000美元的制作成本，会是人们记住这部电影的方式。
verification_notes: Confirmed by Variety, Deadline, Hollywood Reporter, BusinessWire press release (May 27, 2026), CNBC video, Rolling Stone, The Wrap. Tribeca Festival June 3-14, 2026. Premiere date June 10 confirmed by multiple outlets. $2,000 budget and no-camera production confirmed by all sources.

blurb_en: xAI launched Grok Imagine Video 1.5 on May 31 — an image-to-video model that turns a single still image and a text prompt into a clip up to 15 seconds long at 720p with native audio, trained on Colossus 2, xAI's 555,000-GPU supercomputer facility. It immediately claimed the top spot on the Artificial Analysis Image-to-Video Arena leaderboard, 52 Elo points above version 1.0, surpassing Seedance 2.0 and Google Veo. Elon Musk announced the launch by sharing an AI-generated trailer for the Iliad, which is one way to do a product reveal. For imaging professionals, the image-to-video use case is the most relevant benchmark: how far a single photographic frame can be extended without losing the original's lighting, character, and feel is the test the market is currently running.
blurb_zh: xAI于5月31日发布Grok Imagine Video 1.5——将单张静止图片加文字提示转化为最长15秒、720p分辨率、带原生音频的视频，在Colossus 2超算集群（约55.5万块英伟达GPU）上训练完成。发布即登顶Artificial Analysis图生视频竞技场排行榜，比1.0版本提升52个Elo分，超越Seedance 2.0和谷歌Veo。埃隆·马斯克用一段AI生成的《伊利亚特》预告片宣布了这一消息。对于成像专业人士来说，真正的测试问题是：一张照片能被延伸多远，同时保留原片的光线、人物和质感。
verification_notes: Confirmed by The Decoder, xAI official blog (x.ai/news/grok-imagine-1-5), Storyboard18, PixVerse, imagine.art, and other sources. Launch date May 31, 2026 (API preview alias grok-imagine-video-1.5-2026-05-30). Leaderboard position and Elo jump confirmed by multiple sources. Musk Iliad trailer confirmed by Storyboard18.

blurb_en: China's National Radio and Television Administration reported this week that online platforms removed more than 8,000 AI-altered videos and penalized over 20 accounts in May, under an ongoing campaign targeting AI versions of classic Chinese literature. The targeted content includes AI edits that turn Dream of the Red Chamber into a kung fu drama, render Empresses in the Palace as a gunplay film, and depict the Monkey King from Journey to the West riding a motorcycle — all of which, apparently, were being produced and watched. The campaign covers the Four Great Classical Novels, historical themes, revolutionary narratives, and heroes and role models, which collectively describes most of Chinese TV production. The Chinese internet is generating AI remixes of 1,000-year-old government-protected texts, and the government is removing them 8,000 at a time.
blurb_zh: 中国国家广播电视总局本周通报：5月期间，各平台累计下架AI改编违规视频8000余条，处置违规账号逾20个。被整治的内容包括：将《红楼梦》改编为武侠剧、把《甄嬛传》变成枪战片、以及让孙悟空骑着摩托车出镜——而这些内容显然都有人在做、有人在看。整治范围涵盖四大名著、历史题材、革命题材及英模形象，基本覆盖了中国影视制作的主要类型。中国互联网正在用AI对千年经典进行二次创作，而监管部门正以每次八千条的速度清除它们。
verification_notes: Confirmed by Global Times (June 2026, URL pattern 202606), Breitbart (June 2, 2026), aibase.com, Cryptopolitan, and SCMP. 8,000 videos removed in May and 20+ accounts penalized confirmed by Global Times. Specific examples (motorcycle Monkey King, Red Chamber kung fu, Empresses gunplay) confirmed by multiple outlets. Campaign started January 2026 per Global Times Dec 2025 and Jan 2026 reports.
